mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( book_id, user_id, review_rating, review_content ) VALUES ( #{bookId}, #{userId}, #{reviewRating}, #{reviewContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT review_id, book_id, user_id, review_rating, review_content, review_date, review_last_modified FROM review WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET review_rating = #{reviewRating}, review_content = #{reviewContent}, review_last_modified = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT review_id, book_id, user_id, review_rating, review_content, review_date, review_last_modified FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY review_date DESC

SELECT r.review_id, r.book_id, r.user_id, r.review_rating, r.review_content, r.review_date, r.review_last_modified, u.user_nickname AS nickname/*화면에 표시할 닉네임 필요*/ FROM review r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.book_id = #{bookId} AND u.user_status = 'active'
ORDER BY r.review_rating, r.review_date DESC
ORDER BY r.review_rating DESC, r.review_date DESC
ORDER BY r.review_date DESC
SELECT AVG(review_rating) FROM review r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.book_id = #{bookId} AND u.user_status = 'active'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review r JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND u.user_status = 'active'
